all.en: Welcome to the Greenleaf Rewards loyalty program enrollment guide.
all.zh: 歡迎參閱 Greenleaf Rewards 會員獎勵方案加入指南。

all.en: Our program is designed to thank you for choosing us as your shopping destination.
all.zh: 本方案旨在感謝您選擇我們作為您的購物首選。

all.en: Membership is completely free and only takes a few minutes to set up.
all.zh: 會員資格完全免費，只需幾分鐘即可完成註冊。

all.en: You can sign up online, through our mobile app, or in any physical store.
all.zh: 您可以透過網站、行動應用程式或任一實體門市註冊。

all.en: To enroll online, visit www.greenleaf.com and click the Join Rewards link.
all.zh: 若要線上註冊，請造訪 www.greenleaf.com 並點選「加入會員」連結。

all.en: You will need to provide your name, email address, and a secure password.
all.zh: 您需要提供姓名、電子郵件地址及安全密碼。

all.en: Adding your mobile number allows you to receive exclusive text offers.
all.zh: 提供手機號碼即可收到專屬簡訊優惠。

all.en: Once registered, you will earn one point for every dollar that you spend.
all.zh: 註冊完成後，每消費一美元即可獲得一點。

all.en: Bonus point promotions are offered on selected categories every month.
all.zh: 每月特定類別商品將有點數加倍活動。

all.en: Members also enjoy early access to seasonal sales and limited collections.
all.zh: 會員亦享有季節特賣及限量系列商品的優先選購權。

all.en: Your points can be redeemed for discounts on any purchase over 20 dollars.
all.zh: 您的點數可用於任何超過 20 美元消費的折抵。

all.en: Every 200 points convert into a 10 dollar reward applied at checkout.
all.zh: 每 200 點可兌換 10 美元的結帳折抵。

all.en: Members reach Silver status after spending 500 dollars in a calendar year.
all.zh: 會員於年度內消費滿 500 美元即可升級為銀卡會員。

all.en: Silver members enjoy free shipping on all online orders without any minimum.
all.zh: 銀卡會員所有線上訂單均享免運，無最低消費限制。

all.en: Gold status is unlocked at 1,500 dollars in qualifying annual spending.
all.zh: 年度合格消費滿 1,500 美元可解鎖金卡資格。

all.en: Gold members receive birthday gifts, double point days, and personal styling.
all.zh: 金卡會員可獲生日禮物、雙倍點數日及專屬造型服務。

all.en: Your member dashboard tracks your points, rewards, and tier progress.
all.zh: 您的會員儀表板可追蹤點數、獎勵及等級進度。

all.en: You can also link your email preferences to control promotional messages.
all.zh: 您也可透過電子郵件偏好設定來管理促銷訊息。

all.en: If you forget your card, simply provide your phone number at the register.
all.zh: 若忘記攜帶會員卡，只需於結帳時提供手機號碼即可。

all.en: Points expire 24 months after the date they are earned, so use them often.
all.zh: 點數自獲得日起 24 個月後失效，請多多使用。

all.en: Throughout the year, we host members-only events at flagship locations.
all.zh: 全年我們在旗艦店舉辦多場僅限會員參加的活動。

all.en: These events feature product previews, expert talks, and refreshments.
all.zh: 這些活動包含新品搶先看、專家講座及輕食招待。

all.en: For questions about your account, please email rewards@greenleaf.com.
all.zh: 如有帳戶相關問題，請來信至 rewards@greenleaf.com。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you into the Greenleaf Rewards family.
all.zh: 我們期待歡迎您加入 Greenleaf Rewards 大家庭。
